role_title: Product Manager, Post-Investments - Vice President / Senior Vice President

location.office_time_required: Monday-Thursday in office, remote on Friday

secondary_archetype: Technical PM with WealthTech/fintech domain focus

seniority.level: Staff / Principal IC (VP to SVP equivalent)
level_signals: Title range of Vice President / Senior Vice President
Mentor and guide junior product managers
Partner with executive stakeholders (internal and external)
Comp range $190K-$230K base consistent with VP/SVP at a fintech firm

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8 - 12+ years of product management experience, with significant exposure to WealthTech, fintech, alternative investments, or wealth management platforms.
Deep understanding of the U.S. wealth management ecosystem and advisor technology landscape.
Strong experience working with large datasets; SQL proficiency and a data-driven decision-making approach are required.
Demonstrated success managing complex, cross-functional initiatives in fast-paced growth environments.
Experience engaging directly with external clients and executive stakeholders to define requirements and deliver strategic implementations.
Expertise in writing detailed product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for engineering teams.
Experience operating within agile development methodologies, with a bias toward rapid deployment, learning, and iteration.
Exceptional analytical, problem-solving, and prioritization skills.
Excellent communication skills and executive presence, with the ability to influence senior leadership and build consensus.
Entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.

scope.surface: Client Architecture Solutions — WealthTech platform capabilities for wealth management and alternative investment distribution, advisor desktop integrations
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / platform serving wealth managers and financial advisors for alternative investment distribution
core_responsibilities: Own and define the product vision and roadmap for key WealthTech platform capabilities.
Lead strategic client engagements to deploy integrated technology solutions and ensure successful adoption across advisor desktops.
Partner with executive stakeholders (internal and external) to align on product direction, priorities, and strategic initiatives.
Drive platform usage and adoption by delivering solutions that meet user needs and enhance platform stickiness.
Lead the end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to launch, including requirements definition, user stories, acceptance criteria, QA, and iteration.
Ensure flawless execution of product releases by proactively managing risks, dependencies, and cross-functional coordination.
Investigate production issues and drive both tactical and strategic resolutions to minimize user impact.
Mentor and guide junior product managers, fostering a culture of excellence, accountability, and continuous learning.

compensation.equity_form: equity for all full-time employees (form not specified) plus annual performance bonus

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($190K-$230K base) with equity and bonus
Clear product surface and ownership area (Client Architecture Solutions / WealthTech post-investment workflows)
Comprehensive benefits including 100% employer-paid dental, vision, telemedicine, mental health, and unlimited PTO
Hybrid with only one remote day (Friday) — clear, predictable structure
Mentorship responsibility signals meaningful seniority and influence
red_flags: No specific city listed in the JD; office location(s) not named, making it unclear where the role is based
8-12+ years range is wide; ambiguity between VP and SVP title levels may affect comp ceiling
JD combines VP and SVP into one posting — seniority level and comp ceiling may vary significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title range VP/SVP, years 8-12+, and comp)
seniority.manages_people (inferred from 'Mentor and guide junior product managers')
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and industry context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (not stated in JD body; left empty)
ambiguities: Role title spans two seniority levels (Vice President / Senior Vice President); compensation range may differ between the two but is presented as a single band ($190K-$230K).
Office location city is never named in the JD body, making it impossible to confirm where hybrid attendance is required.
Years range '8 - 12+' is unusually wide and the '+' qualifier makes the upper bound open-ended.
